{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Purelake Remnant
| introduced = cradle-02-soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[binding]] Gesha worked on was from a [[Purelake Remnant]] with a primary aspect of water.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c11">''Soulsmith'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
